meaning: v.鎹愬姪,鎹愮尞,璐＄尞,鎶曠ǹ
examples: You need not feel obliged to contribute.
Local businesses have agreed to contribute.

Those types of things where employers actually help contribute oftentimes to people's retirement savings.
